template_data.name: High Protein Recipe Pin
template_data.prompt: Generate text for each field based on the recipe title provided. Use the field_prompts JSON below: for each key, generate content using the corresponding prompt (replace {{title}} with the user's recipe title). Your response MUST be a single JSON object only, with one key per field and the value being the generated text. Format: {"field_name": "text", ...}. Do not include 'website' or 'domain' in your output; the domain name is injected automatically.

field_prompts.badge: Generate content for badge for recipe {{title}}. You are writing a BADGE label for a Pinterest food pin (e.g. 'High Protein', 'Easy Recipe', 'Low Carb'). Format: 2-3 words, title case, max 18 characters. Output ONLY the replacement text for badge, no quotes. Given the user's recipe title {{title}}, return only the badge text.
field_prompts.title: Generate content for title for recipe {{title}}. You are writing the main TITLE for a Pinterest food pin. Format: short recipe name, 2-4 words, title case, max 25 characters (e.g. 'Cottage Cheese Bread', 'Stuffed Peppers'). Output ONLY the replacement text for title, no quotes. Given the user's recipe title {{title}}, return only the title text.
field_prompts.tagline:
Generate content for tagline for recipe {{title}}. You are writing a catchy TAGLINE below the image (e.g. 'For Healthy Breakfast!', 'Easy & Delicious'). Format: 3-6 words, can include
for line break, max 40 characters. Output ONLY the replacement text for tagline, no quotes. Given the user's recipe title {{title}}, return only the tagline text.

template_data.html:
{{badge}}

{{title}}

www.{{domain}}

{{tagline}}

template_data.name: Orange Gradient Recipe Pin
template_data.prompt: Generate text for each field based on the recipe title provided. Use the field_prompts JSON below: for each key, generate content using the corresponding prompt (replace {{title}} with the user's recipe title). Your response MUST be a single JSON object only, with one key per field and the value being the generated text. Format: {"field_name": "text", ...}. Do not include 'website' or 'domain' in your output; the domain name is injected automatically.

field_prompts.small_title: Generate content for small_title for recipe {{title}}. A category or ingredient hint above the main title (e.g. 'Cottage Cheese', 'Italian'). Format: 1-3 words, title case, max 20 characters. Output ONLY the replacement text for small_title, no quotes. Given the user's recipe title {{title}}, return only the small_title text.
field_prompts.title: Generate content for title for recipe {{title}}. You are writing the main TITLE for a Pinterest food pin. Format: short recipe name, 2-4 words, uppercase, max 25 characters (e.g. 'STUFFED PEPPERS', 'PASTA CARBONARA'). Output ONLY the replacement text for title, no quotes. Given the user's recipe title {{title}}, return only the title text.
field_prompts.badge: Generate content for badge for recipe {{title}}. A short descriptor (e.g. 'Easy & High Protein', 'Quick 30-Min'). Format: 2-4 words, max 25 characters. Output ONLY the replacement text for badge, no quotes. Given the user's recipe title {{title}}, return only the badge text.

template_data.html:
{{small_title}}
{{title}}
{{badge}}
www.{{domain}}
